creator: supportsobaka@mail.ru
text: Finally, if this is behavior as per design and nobody plan to chang, then it should be mentioned in the manpage that "allow mount" will need additionally this or this... e.g. the user must own dataset, or/and a specific sysctl must be set, or/and setuid/sudo, etc.... In fact means "allow mount will not work, forget about it". It would be maybe better remove mount from zfs allow at all. Result is pretty the same.
